title: Implement Tickflow worktree lifecycle helpers
description: Add helpers to create, reuse for resume, inspect, preserve, and remove per-tick git worktrees. Create branches with tf/<run-id>/<tick-id>, detect existing path/branch safely, and record absolute worktree paths in tickflow_lease.
acceptance_criteria: Worktree creation succeeds for a disposable tick; existing paths/branches are handled safely; terminal cleanup removes only worktrees owned by the current run; tickflow_lease contains absolute worktree path and run id.
closed_reason: Implemented Tickflow worktree lifecycle helpers: create/reuse worktree, safe path collision checks, branch existence handling, guarded remove helper, tickflow_lease writer with absolute path/run id, and --worktrees execution wiring.
